insights.cost_summary: Low infrastructure cost floors across all tiers — pricing is purely a value conversation
insights.demand_summary: Human-paced professional researchers making hundreds of calls per day across write, read, and heavy query operations
insights.value_summary: High value — enables knowledge synthesis worth thousands to millions in professional outcomes
